case_title: CONTRACT RESOURCE GROUP INC. VS BRAYTON INTERNATIONAL

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CONTRACT RESOURCE GROUP  INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BRAYTON INTERNATIONAL $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,015.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
